domains.label: Product Development
domains.description: Opportunity, value, research, requirements, scope, prioritization, and product acceptance.

domains.label: Engineering
domains.description: Architecture, implementation, code structure, APIs, data, debugging, and technical delivery.

domains.label: Experience Design
domains.description: Information architecture, interaction, visual systems, responsive behavior, content, and accessibility.

domains.label: Quality & Verification
domains.description: Testing, review, evidence, regression prevention, evaluation, and acceptance gates.

domains.label: Security
domains.description: Threat analysis, secure design and implementation, security review, and incident boundaries.

domains.label: Operations & Reliability
domains.description: Deployment, observability, resilience, runtime health, incidents, and rollback.

domains.label: AI & Agent Systems
domains.description: Model, prompt, context, agent runtime, AI architecture, and AI product integration.

domains.label: Governance & Delivery
domains.description: Authority, provenance, rules, ethics, workflow discipline, and release authorization.

domains.label: Developer Experience
domains.description: Repository discovery, planning, onboarding, tooling, documentation, and reusable execution support.

lifecycle_stages.label: Discover
lifecycle_stages.description: Understand the opportunity, current state, evidence, and constraints.

lifecycle_stages.label: Define
lifecycle_stages.description: Turn evidence into intent, requirements, contracts, and decision boundaries.

lifecycle_stages.label: Plan
lifecycle_stages.description: Choose topology, sequence, ownership, dependencies, and verification strategy.

lifecycle_stages.label: Design
lifecycle_stages.description: Shape architecture, interaction, visual direction, data, APIs, and failure handling.

lifecycle_stages.label: Build
lifecycle_stages.description: Implement the accepted behavior and supporting artifacts.

lifecycle_stages.label: Verify
lifecycle_stages.description: Test, review, evaluate, and prove acceptance or expose gaps.

lifecycle_stages.label: Release
lifecycle_stages.description: Authorize and prepare an immutable candidate for delivery.

lifecycle_stages.label: Operate
lifecycle_stages.description: Run, observe, protect, recover, and support the live system.

lifecycle_stages.label: Learn
lifecycle_stages.description: Capture outcomes and route verified reusable learning.
